description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image with a single test stage. Include a global before_script that creates directories /go/src/gitlab.com/jckimble and /go/src/_/builds, copies the project files into /go/src/gitlab.com/jckimble/go-health, creates a symlink from /go/src/gitlab.com/go-health to /go/src/_/builds/jckimble, and changes directory to /go/src/gitlab.com/jckimble/go-health. Add a coverage job in the test stage that runs go test -v -coverprofile cover. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
